meta.title: S4x19 Cabana Sessions
meta.description: Dale Peterson takes a walk around the S4x19 Cabana Sessions. You can see how this environment is quite different than tabletops in a hotel ballroom. Sun, palm trees, pool and ocean. Boat races, golf, and live graffiti art. And the bonus dunk take footage at the end.
